title: Slope
description: A fast-paced 3D running game where you steer a ball down a steep slope. Avoid obstacles and stay on the track!

title: Run 3
description: Run, jump, and ignore the laws of physics in this space-themed platformer. Explore the galaxy in a series of tunnels.

title: Tetris
description: The classic block-stacking puzzle game. Rotate and place falling blocks to clear lines and score points.
Join the numbers to get to the 2048 tile! Use your arrow keys to move the tiles.

title: Tunnel Rush
description: Dodge obstacles at high speeds in a colorful tunnel. Test your reflexes in this neon-lit challenge.

title: Retro Bowl
description: The perfect game for the armchair quarterback to finally prove a point. Manage your team and win the big game.

title: Cookie Clicker
description: The original idle game where you click a giant cookie to bake more cookies. Buy upgrades and hire grandmas!

title: Crossy Road
description: Why did the chicken cross the road? Dodge traffic, cross rivers, and jump over logs in this endless hopper.
